basic_details.organization_name: Health and Family Welfare Department, Gujarat
basic_details.short_information: The Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 25 Female Health Worker. Candidates with 12TH Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 06-06-2026, and closes on 20-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through GSSSB website, gsssb.gujarat.gov.in.

how_to_apply: Visit the official OJAS portal at https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in.
Click on "Online Application" → Select GSSSB → Click on the advertisement for Female Health Worker, Class-3 (Advt. No. 417/202627).
Fill in all Personal Details and Educational Details carefully, ensuring all information matches your original certificates.

Upload your Passport-size Photo (5cm x 3.6cm, JPG, max 15KB) and Signature (2.5cm x 7.5cm, JPG, max 15KB). Photo must have a white background and must not be older than 1 year from the last application date.
Accept the Assurance (Baanhedari) terms and click Save to generate your Application Number.
Click Confirm Application to generate your Confirmation Number - save this for all future correspondence. No changes are possible after confirmation.
Pay the examination fee online by June 23, 2026 (11:59 PM) using Debit Card, Internet Banking, UPI, or Wallet on the OJAS portal.
Download and print the completed application form. Keep it safe until the entire recruitment process is complete.
seo_tags: GSSSB Recruitment 2026: Apply for Female Health Worker (Class-3) Post – Special Drive for Divyang Candidates
